name: Normal Clinical Note - Happy Path
description: Standard clinical note with accurate summarization. SENTINEL should PASS - no hallucinations, contradictions, or omissions.

clinical_note.content:
Male patient, 45 years old. Follow-up visit.

Reason for visit: Hypertension follow-up.

History: Hypertension diagnosed 3 years ago, on treatment.

Current medication:
- Enalapril 10mg/day (morning)
- Aspirin 100mg/day (with lunch)

Allergies: No known allergies (NKDA).

Physical examination:
- BP: 128/82 mmHg
- HR: 72 bpm
- Weight: 78 kg

Laboratory (1 month ago):
- Glucose: 95 mg/dL
- Creatinine: 0.9 mg/dL
- Potassium: 4.2 mEq/L

Diagnosis: Controlled hypertension.

Plan:
- Continue current treatment
- Follow-up in 3 months
- Low-sodium diet

layer2_trace.rationale: All claims should trace back to source note

layer3_contradiction.rationale: No contradictions exist between summary and source

layer4_critical.rationale: No critical values in source; nothing to omit

why_this_matters: Establishes that SENTINEL does not produce false positives on accurate summaries. A working validation system must pass clean data.
synthetic_data_notice: All patient data in this test case is 100% synthetic and fictional. No real patient information was used.
